summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Alpha Architect US Equity ETF (AAUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to pursue long-term capital appreciation. The fund invests in broad exposure to US equities. AAUS was launched on Jul 22, 2025 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

holdings.infoBox: AAUS is an equity ETF with a total of 353 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.49%, NVIDIA at 7.66%, Microsoft at 5.07%, Amazon.com at 3.77%, and Alphabet at 3.52%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
